personal.title: Senior Project Manager
personal.summary: Experienced project manager with a strong technical background in frontend development. I combine agile methodology with technical expertise to lead cross-functional teams to peak performance and successfully deliver complex digital transformation projects.
personal.infoText:
Please enter the access code from the business card you received.

If you don't have one, please contact me via the email address shown above.

items.title: TechVision GmbH
items.subtitle: Senior Project Manager
items.description:
Leading a portfolio of **three parallel digital transformation projects** with a total budget of €2.5M. Managing cross-functional teams (15–20 people) using Scrum and SAFe.

- Introduced a company-wide design system in collaboration with UX and frontend teams
- Reduced time-to-market by 30% through optimized release processes
- Stakeholder management at C-level

items.title: Digital Solutions AG
items.subtitle: Project Manager
items.description:
Responsible for planning and delivery of client projects in the e-commerce space. Close collaboration with development teams and product owners.

- Migrated a legacy shop to a modern **React/Next.js** architecture
- Introduced Jira and Confluence as central project management tools
- Built an internal training program for agile methods

items.title: WebKraft Studios
items.subtitle: Frontend Developer
items.description:
Developed responsive web applications for mid-sized clients. Close coordination with designers and backend developers.

- Built SPAs with **React** and **TypeScript**
- Implemented component libraries and style guides
- Mentored working students and interns

items.title: Agentur Kreativpixel
items.subtitle: Junior Frontend Developer
items.description:
Entry into professional web development. Built client websites and landing pages.

- HTML, CSS, JavaScript and jQuery
- Responsive design and cross-browser compatibility
- First experience with Git and agile workflows

items.title: Technical University of Munich
items.subtitle: M.Sc. Computer Science
items.description: Focus on human-computer interaction and software engineering. Master's thesis on user-centered design of agile project management tools.

items.title: Ludwig Maximilian University of Munich
items.subtitle: B.Sc. Media Informatics
items.description: Fundamentals of computer science, web development and media design.

items.title: Professional Scrum Master II (PSM II)
items.description: Advanced Scrum Master certification from **Scrum.org** focusing on servant leadership and organizational change.

items.title: SAFe 6 Agilist (SA)
items.description: Scaled Agile Framework — lean-agile leadership and implementation of agile practices at enterprise scale.

items.title: PRINCE2 Foundation & Practitioner
items.description: Traditional project management framework for structured project governance.

items.title: AWS Cloud Practitioner
items.description: Foundational understanding of AWS cloud services, architecture and cost models.
